title: Fight on TV show 'I'm a Celebrity'
summary: On the final night of the TV show 'I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!', there was a big argument. The show is set in a jungle in South Africa, where famous people live together and do challenges. In this special version, past contestants came back. During a challenge, footballer Jimmy Bullard quit, which made actor Adam Thomas very angry. He shouted at Jimmy using bad words. The hosts Ant and Dec had to raise their voices to stop the fight. Some other stars, like Sinitta and Gemma Collins, walked away. In the end, Adam Thomas won the show and became the 'king of the jungle'. Later, Adam said he was proud of staying true to himself. The producers didn't show all of his angry outburst because it was too strong. Other contestants said Adam looked like he might attack Jimmy. Jimmy called Adam's reaction silly and said he quit because he wanted to go home.

keywords.explanation: when people disagree and shout at each other
a person who takes part in a competition
a sudden show of strong emotion, like anger

background_read: This show is about famous people living together in a jungle. They do challenges to earn food and treats. Viewers vote for their favorite, and the winner is called 'king of the jungle'. The show is very popular in the UK.
Article_Structure: WHO: Famous people like Adam Thomas, Jimmy Bullard, Ant and Dec, and other celebrities.
WHAT: A big argument happened during the final of I'm a Celebrity.
WHERE: In a jungle in South Africa.
WHY: Because Jimmy quit a challenge, which made Adam very angry.

perspectives.description: He was angry because Jimmy quit and almost caused him to be eliminated.
He thought Adam's reaction was silly and said he quit because he wanted to go home.
